verdict.label: FULL_GREEN
verdict.reason: The v0.7.1 NYM @ CIN MM canary completed the full lifecycle: official final score New York Mets 9, Cincinnati Reds 1 was verified; contest 44 was scored; speculation 33 settled to away/upper/New York Mets; the winning controlled live-fill and setup seed/open positions were claimed; final claim sweeps, public commitments/orderbook, and live-MM process checks are zero. Caveats are limited to a not-run restart/cold-start probe and CLI readback omission of winSide/settledAt despite converged indexer/protocol state.

capabilities.notes: Primary target verified and quote_ready before live writes.
Reserved live maker was clean before start and wallet balances/allowances were sufficient.
No unlimited approvals; no new live approvals were required.
Quote dry-run was synthetic/read-only by nature and selected target 44 only.
Live public commitments posted on target 44/33 only.
Exactly one controlled live fill succeeded.
Telemetry fill event source is own-state-stream.
End-of-run public/API/MM visible-open exposure is zero.
Not part of this live-window canary artifact; final zero-exposure/process checks cover shutdown safety.
Official final score New York Mets 9, Cincinnati Reds 1 verified and contest 44 scored.
Speculation 33 settled to away/upper/New York Mets.
Winning upper/New York Mets positions for mm-shakeout-flow-a and ospex-stage-maker-b claimed; losing lower/Cincinnati positions no-op.
Live + postgame controlled costs stayed within the low-value canary envelope.

transactions.purpose: Setup handoff created verified contest 44 for NYM @ CIN before the live MM window.
Setup handoff seed/open moneyline fill for speculation 33.
Exactly one controlled live MM fill by mm-shakeout-flow-a against commitment 0x7818744c708eb986aefcfe7ec70913821652bd061268f61287f0a78b22a6662b.
Score contest 44 after official MLB final source showed New York Mets 9, Cincinnati Reds 1.
Settle speculation 33 to away/upper/New York Mets.
Claim mm-shakeout-flow-a winning live-fill upper/New York Mets position.
Claim ospex-stage-maker-b winning setup seed/open upper/New York Mets position.
